_note: Mahabharata character arcs — 7 episodes per character, played sequentially. The script generator walks arcs in order: arc 1 episode 1, 2, ... 7, then arc 2 episode 1, ... etc. State tracking via recent_topics.json (already excludes used topics). Once an arc is fully exhausted (all 7 episodes used in recent_topics), the next arc starts. Designed to train YouTube's Suggested algorithm to pair sequential episodes — channel's RELATED_VIDEO traffic was 0.1% before this system.
_added: 2026-05-15 — channel-focus refactor after 13-day analytics showed topic-salad (random Mahabharata stories per upload) wasn't building Suggested traffic. Sequential character arcs in playlist + episode-numbered titles fix that.
_tier2_2026-05-16: Tier 2 plan review: (a) reordered Bhishma/Karna/Draupadi arcs so each leads with its most emotionally devastating episode (first-impression effect drives playlist sub-conversion). Episode strings unchanged — already-used topics in recent_topics.json still match by topic-string. (b) Added Eklavya (devotion + caste injustice) and Ashwatthama (cursed immortal) — user-identified as naturally viral emotional archetypes. Total arcs: 5 → 7. Total topics: 35 → 49.
_phase1_2026-05-29: Phase 1 Stabilization (RULE 4 + Addition B): Reordered arcs so Karna is FIRST (Week 1 ships next 7 days), Bhishma SECOND (Week 2). Replaced Karna topics with user's emotional-reframing list. Replaced Bhishma topics with user's silence/guilt-themed list. Added `emotional_fingerprint` to each arc — character's distinct emotional DNA. The fingerprint feeds into the script_generator system prompt so every Karna script lands on rejection+loyalty, every Bhishma script lands on guilt+silence. Variance comes from fingerprints DIFFERING across arcs (Karna's loud rejection vs Bhishma's silent guilt), NOT from artificial intensity-shuffling within an arc.
_phase15_2026-06-08: Phase 15 DNA rewrite — channel analytics 2026-06-08 showed -68.8% view decline over 7 uploads driven by topic-fandom mismatch (Yudhishthira/Eklavya philosophical topics pulled 11-15 views vs Karna's 600+ floor). Deep-dive on the 158% AVP 5-24 Karna friendship video isolated a 4-part DNA: name-first hook + subversion adjective + charged moral noun + trait inversion. ALL non-Karna topics were rewritten to embed this DNA so the Phase 15 semantic gate in script_generator.py admits them as anchor-tier candidates. Guardrails: (1) NARRATIVE ALIGNMENT — the underlying event/incident is preserved; only the moral framing is subverted (e.g., Yudhishthira's truth becomes 'hidden cowardice exposed by Yaksha', not a fabricated event). (2) ENGLISH-CLICKABLE — every topic carries highly clickable English nouns (sin, mistake, lie, betrayal) alongside Hindi flavor. (3) REGEX EXACTNESS — singular noun forms only to match Phase 15's word-boundary regex. Karna arc preserved as-is — it was already 6/7 DNA-compliant and is the validated 158% AVP archetype.

arcs.name: Karna — The Forgotten Son
topics: Karna's greatest mistake — the day he chose loyalty to Duryodhana over Krishna's offer of the empire and brotherhood with the Pandavas, knowing dharma was on the other side
Krishna's final offer to Karna — the secret pre-war visit where Krishna revealed Kunti's truth and offered him the throne if he switched sides, and Karna refused
Karna's hidden jealousy of Arjuna — the lifelong resentment that drove every choice he made, the wound his loyalty never quite covered
The greatest curse that destroyed Karna — Parashurama discovering his student's hidden caste while sleeping on his lap, the doom that surfaced on Karna's last battlefield
Why Karna could never defeat Arjuna — the hidden weight of his greatest curse, lost armor, sunken chariot wheel, and the gods themselves siding against him in his final hour
Karna's final lie — the hidden truth about his identity he chose to bury even as he died, the secret he kept from everyone including himself, even from Duryodhana
Karna's last regret on the battlefield — the dying thoughts of a man who realized too late that his loyalty to the wrong friend had cost him everything

arcs.name: Bhishma — The Vow That Doomed a Dynasty
topics: Bhishma's greatest fatal vow — the day prince Devavrata renounced the throne and married life for his father Shantanu's love, the secret oath that doomed Hastinapur
Bhishma's biggest betrayal — the elder who knew Duryodhana's cause was unjust yet hid behind his vow to the throne over dharma, watching the war from inside his own hidden guilt
Bhishma's hidden guilt during Draupadi's humiliation — the moments inside his silence as the dharma he upheld broke in the Kuru sabha, his sword resting because his vow forbade it
Bhishma's hidden sin against Hastinapur — crowning blind Dhritarashtra over his brother Pandu's lineage, the secret succession mistake that planted the war's first seed
Bhishma's untold guilt through Kurukshetra — fighting the children he raised, killing the warriors he taught, the hidden regret of every dead soldier he carried in silence
Bhishma's greatest regret on the bed of arrows — 58 days replaying the choices that doomed him, the hidden truth he never told, choosing the moment of his own departure
Bhishma's final regret to Yudhishthira — the dying truth from the bed of arrows, the bitter wisdom delivered too late to undo what had been done to his bloodline

_auto_added.topic: Bhishma's Greatest Hidden Regret of Loyalty
Bhishma's Secret Guilt of Unspoken Truth
Bhishma's Real Curse of Unwavering Duty

arcs.name: Arjuna — The Reluctant Warrior
topics: Arjuna's hidden truth at Drona's bird-eye test — the secret ruthlessness Drona spotted in his student, the greatest archer made by a cold heart not a kind one
Arjuna's hidden vow as Brihannala — the warrior's secret year-long humiliation disguised as a dance teacher, the greatest mistake of his exile in Virata's court
Arjuna's greatest fear in the Gita — the hidden truth Krishna had to reveal because the warrior nearly broke before the war, the secret regret Krishna exposed on the chariot
Arjuna's greatest vow to kill Jayadratha — the impossible promise born from his hidden grief over Abhimanyu, the secret revenge that nearly destroyed him before sundown
Arjuna's hidden lie against Bhishma — using Shikhandi as a shield, the secret betrayal of the warrior code, the greatest sin of a grandson against his grandfather
Arjuna's secret lie about Ashwatthama — the untold betrayal that broke his guru Drona's spirit, the day a son's name became his hidden sin
Arjuna's hidden vow after Abhimanyu — the father's secret loyalty promise born from grief, the greatest mistake that turned Kurukshetra on day fourteen

_auto_added.topic: Arjuna's Real Regret: Hidden Truth of a Reluctant Warrior's Fatal Vow
Arjuna's Greatest Sin: The Secret Pride That Nearly Broke Him
Arjuna's Untold Fear: The Hidden Betrayal of His Own Glory
Arjuna's Hidden Loyalty: The Untold Sacrifice That Haunted Him
Arjuna's Fatal Doubt: The Secret Curse That Reframed His Legendary Courage

arcs.name: Draupadi — The Queen Who Lit the War
topics: Draupadi's greatest humiliation in the Kuru sabha — the queen pulled by her hair, the secret sin every elder watched in silence, the untold betrayal that lit the war
Draupadi's hidden birth from sacrificial fire — Drupada's secret sin, the daughter he weaponized to destroy Drona, the greatest curse of the Panchala line
Draupadi's swayamvara — the queen's greatest mistake when she rejected Karna for a disguised Arjuna, the secret pride that doomed an empire
Draupadi's untold marriage to five Pandavas — the hidden vow that bound the brothers forever, the queen's greatest sacrifice nobody ever named
Draupadi's secret vow about her hair — the queen's untold revenge, never tied until washed in Dushasana's blood, the greatest curse she carried in silence
Draupadi's hidden rage in forest exile — twelve years of secret humiliation she refused to forget, the queen's coldest vow waiting for the day of revenge
Draupadi's untold grief after the war — the queen's greatest betrayal by victory, winning a kingdom of corpses, losing all five sons in one secret night

arcs.name: Yudhishthira — The Cost of Truth
topics: Yudhishthira's hidden cowardice at the Yaksha lake — the secret questions that exposed his greatest lie about dharma, the truth no king wanted answered
Yudhishthira's hidden sin in the dice game — the truthful king's greatest betrayal, gambling away his wife and his brothers as the secret cost of his pride
Yudhishthira's greatest lie — the only deception of his life, and the secret cost no one knew, the day Ashwatthama's name became his hidden sin
Yudhishthira's last test at heaven's gate — the secret truth about the dog that exposed the king's hidden loyalty, the final cost of dharma he almost paid
Yudhishthira's greatest fear in hell — the secret betrayal heaven showed him of his own brothers, the king's hidden guilt no kingdom could undo
Yudhishthira's hidden guilt as king — the prosperous kingdom built on the secret regret of every cousin he killed, the throne's greatest fatal cost
Yudhishthira's final regret in the Himalayas — the king's last hidden betrayal, watching every brother and Draupadi fall on the secret death-walk to heaven

arcs.name: Eklavya — The Devotion That Cost a Thumb
topics: Eklavya's greatest sacrifice — the hidden thumb he cut off for a guru who never taught him, the untold sin of caste that took an archer's hand
Eklavya's hidden truth before Drona's statue — the forest student's greatest betrayal by caste, the secret skill that surpassed Arjuna without a teacher
Drona's greatest sin against Eklavya — the hidden caste betrayal at the academy gates that doomed a tribal prince before he could lift a bow
Arjuna's greatest fear about Eklavya — the hidden seven-arrow truth in the dog's mouth, the secret archer who exposed Drona's biggest lie
Eklavya's untold legacy as Nishadha king — the hidden loyalty his people kept alive, the secret history the kshatriyas erased from every record
Krishna's hidden sin against Eklavya — the greatest secret murder that secured Arjuna's title, the dharma-defender's untold betrayal of a true devotee
Eklavya's untold absence in the Gita — Krishna's greatest silence, the secret name the scripture refused to honor, the hidden sin of devotion forgotten

arcs.name: Ashwatthama — The Cursed One
topics: Ashwatthama's hidden truth in Yudhishthira's lie — the secret name that killed his father Drona from grief not blade, the greatest sin of war
Ashwatthama's greatest sin — the hidden midnight massacre of the sleeping Pandava sons, the secret revenge that broke a Brahmin into a butcher
Ashwatthama's greatest curse — the hidden Brahmastra against Uttara's womb, the secret revenge that doomed an unborn Parikshit before he could be named
Krishna's greatest curse on Ashwatthama — the hidden three-thousand-year sentence, the secret wound that would never close, the untold cost of revenge
Ashwatthama's hidden wound — Krishna's greatest punishment, the secret gem torn from his forehead, the untold betrayal it sealed for eternity
Ashwatthama's untold immortality — the hidden curse that still walks the earth, the secret warrior some say begs for oil in Indian forests at night
Ashwatthama's greatest tragedy — the hidden truth of Mahabharata's secret cost, the man punished beyond death itself, the untold sin no era can erase

_phase21_auto_expansion: Phase 21 (2026-06-25) — `_auto_added` sidecar keys per arc hold auto-expander provenance objects {topic, source, added_at, validated_passes, llm_quality_tier}. The picker unions arc['topics'] and arc['_auto_added'][].topic as a single eligibility pool. See pipeline/topic_expander.py.
